tool_args.label: FTA PTASP Final Rule requirement
tool_args.raw_text: The Federal Transit Administration (FTA) PTASP Final Rule 49 CFR 673 requires operators of urban public transportation systems that receive federal funds to develop a PTASP that documents the processes and procedures that are in place to manage the agency safety program through the implementation of Safety Management Systems (SMS).

payload.claim_text: The Federal Transit Administration (FTA) PTASP Final Rule 49 CFR 673 requires operators of urban public transportation systems that receive federal funds to develop a PTASP that documents the processes and procedures that are in place to manage the agency safety program through the implementation of Safety Management Systems (SMS)
payload.subject: FTA PTASP Final Rule 49 CFR 673

evidence_refs.source_quote: The Federal Transit Administration (FTA) PTASP Final Rule 49 CFR 673 requires operators of urban public transportation systems that receive federal funds to develop a PTASP

tool_args.label: Annual PTASP review requirement
tool_args.raw_text: OSS must conduct an annual review of the PTASPs in accordance with 49 CFR Part 673 to incorporate modifications and updates such as may be mandated by the PTSB, changes in management, incorporation of new equipment, or new systems and facilities, operational changes, and any safety related topics and recommendations from the MTA Board. This annual review requires MTA Board's review and approval.
